---
title: "R Markdown Practice"
author: "Leonard Patterson"
date: "2024-12-31"
output: 
  html_document: 
    theme: simplex
---

The code below is a stocked database that is already loaded into R whenever you start a new session. Let's plot speed as a function of distance using the `lm()`; then, we will use the `abline()` functions to add a line of best fit.

```{r}
my_data <- cars
plot(my_data$speed ~ my_data$dist)
model <- lm(my_data$speed ~ my_data$dist)
abline(model, col = "red", lwd = 2)

```
